message:
fix(core): unused Result warnings + type cast lint + ASUPERSYNC migration guards

Lint fixes:
- kalman_watchdog: suppress 3 unused Result warnings in telemetry tests
  with let _ bindings (check_health, classify_component return values)
- patterns: suppress 4 unused Result warnings in telemetry tests with
  let _ bindings (detect return values)
- config/daemon: fix S_ISVTX type cast with u32::from() to satisfy
  clippy integer cast lint on the sticky bit permission OR

ASUPERSYNC runtime migration guards (frankenterm/ssh):
- Add runtime_migration_guards test module (~103 lines) that scans
  ssh crate sources for forbidden direct tokio namespace usage,
  verifying all async operations go through the frankenterm runtime
  compatibility layer instead

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
